MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
CROSS-DEFENDANTS HAIG A. HARRIS, JR., NEIL S. TURNER, AND SCAMPINI, MORTARA & HARRIS MOTION TO STRIKE ALL, OR ALTERNATIVELY, PORTIONS OF THE FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT OF AMBER A. HAASE.

APPEARANCES: Haig Arsen Harris, Jr., Esq. & Neil S. Turner, Esq. of Law Offices of Scampini, Mortara & Harris 421-8556 x-defts & moving parties; Matthew Wertheim, Esq. of Law Offices of Matthew Wertheim 775-8950 specially appearing for deft/x-complainant & opposing party.

RULING: Discussed and the Court took the matter under submission.
After hearing, the Court ruled as follows: Motion to strike on the ground that there is a pending trial de novo of an attorney's fee dispute is denied. The motion to strike the request for emotional distress damages and punitive damages is granted with leave to amend. Moving party to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

RULING: Discussed and the Court took the matter under submission.
